$comment: c51 (D-FFI-STRING-STRSPN): ship strspn + strcspn from <string.h> — sqlite uses strspn(z,"...") (sqlite3.c:37894 + json/fts) and strcspn (134104), both missing from string.json -> S0001. Both fn(ptr<char>,ptr<char>)->u64 (size_t). strspn("12 34","0123456789")==2 ('1','2' in the set, ' ' stops); strcspn("ab 12","0123456789")==3 ('a','b',' ' not in the set, '1' stops) -> exit 42. All formats (string.json maps pe msvcrt + elf/macho libc). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove either symbol -> S0001. Value-correct (libc strspn/strcspn are deterministic).
